---
title: "Harriet Harvey"
---

## Harriet Harvey

**Dates:** (1800/1-1854)

### Description

former servant at Puslinch

### Biography

Harriet Harvey (Holbeton 1800/1-1854) is recorded in the 1841 census as a female servant at Puslinch, and in the 1851 census as a schoolmistress, living alone in the village of Torre in Newton Ferrars parish.

### Letters

- Letter from Monday 17th April [1854]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
